top_signals.title: Oil Falls as Traders Weigh Signs of Iran Peace Deal Progress
top_signals.summary: Oil tumbled on optimism that the US and Iran will reach a peace deal, even as President Donald Trump signaled that the warring sides remain far apart in negotiations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Israel ratchets up its offensive against Hizbollah in Lebanon
top_signals.summary: Israeli military intensifies its campaign against the Lebanese militant group
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon starts selling its AI shopping technology to other retailers
top_signals.summary: Amazon said it's already signed up Kate Spade as a customer for its AI shopping technology.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Government to submit draft extra budget for fiscal 2026 on June 3
top_signals.summary: Totaling over ¥3 trillion, the draft extra budget is aimed at increasing reserve funds in light of Middle East tensions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Price predictions 5/27: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ZEC, ADA, XMR
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin briefly lost the $75,000 level after net flows into spot BTC ETFs turned negative. Do technical charts point to a BTC and altcoin recovery?
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: How US Army combat medics are preparing for an Indo-Pacific fight
top_signals.summary: Distance, contested air, communication disruptions, weather and limited evacuation platforms could greatly impact timely access to medical care.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Paxton victory gives Democrats new hope in Texas Senate race
top_signals.summary: Trump-backed candidate may have limited appeal outside the president’s Maga base
